<!-- Playwright Testing Project for AI Agents MCP -->

## Project Overview
- **Type:** Playwright Testing Framework
- **Language:** TypeScript
- **Purpose:** End-to-end testing with multi-browser support

## Development Commands
- `npm test` - Run all tests
- `npm run test:ui` - Interactive test mode
- `npm run test:debug` - Debug tests
- `npm install` - Install dependencies

## Project Structure
- `tests/` - Test files directory
- `playwright.config.ts` - Playwright configuration
- `package.json` - Project dependencies and scripts
- `tsconfig.json` - TypeScript configuration

## Key Features
- Multi-browser testing (Chromium, Firefox, WebKit)
- Mobile device simulation
- TypeScript support
- HTML reporting
- Trace recording for debugging
- UI mode for interactive development
